evals.prompt: Write Playwright E2E tests for our login flow. Test: successful login with valid credentials, failed login with wrong password, redirect to dashboard after login, session persistence across page reload, and logout.
evals.expected_output: Playwright test file with login flow tests using proper locators and assertions

assertions.name: playwright_test
assertions.description: Uses @playwright/test with page fixture

assertions.name: proper_locators
assertions.description: Uses getByRole, getByText, getByLabel instead of CSS selectors

assertions.name: successful_login
assertions.description: Tests valid credentials leading to dashboard

assertions.name: failed_login
assertions.description: Tests wrong password showing error message

assertions.name: session_persistence
assertions.description: Tests that session survives page reload

assertions.name: logout_test
assertions.description: Tests logout redirects to login page

evals.prompt: Write E2E tests for a CRUD workflow. User creates a project, edits the name, adds a task to it, marks the task as done, then deletes the project. Use Playwright with authenticated state.
evals.expected_output: Full CRUD lifecycle test with authentication, assertions on each step

assertions.name: authenticated_state
assertions.description: Uses storageState for authenticated session, not form login

assertions.name: create_flow
assertions.description: Tests creating a project and asserting it appears in the list

assertions.name: edit_flow
assertions.description: Tests editing project name and asserting the change persists

assertions.name: task_workflow
assertions.description: Tests adding and completing a task within the project

assertions.name: delete_flow
assertions.description: Tests deleting the project and asserting it's gone from the list

evals.prompt: Set up Playwright configuration for cross-browser testing. Need: Chromium, Firefox, WebKit, plus mobile viewports (iPhone 12, Pixel 5). Configure retries, screenshots on failure, and HTML reporter.
evals.expected_output: playwright.config.ts with multi-browser projects, mobile viewports, and reporting

assertions.name: three_browsers
assertions.description: Projects for Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit

assertions.name: mobile_viewports
assertions.description: Mobile device emulation for iPhone 12 and Pixel 5

assertions.name: retry_config
assertions.description: Retries configured (2 for CI)

assertions.name: screenshots_on_failure
assertions.description: Screenshots captured on test failure

assertions.name: html_reporter
assertions.description: HTML reporter configured for test results

evals.prompt: Write E2E tests for a file upload feature. User uploads a PDF, sees it in their files list, can download it, and can delete it. The upload has a 10MB size limit. Test both valid and invalid uploads.
evals.expected_output: E2E tests covering upload, listing, download, deletion, and size limit validation

assertions.name: valid_upload
assertions.description: Tests uploading a valid PDF and seeing it in the list

assertions.name: size_limit
assertions.description: Tests uploading a file over 10MB and asserting rejection

assertions.name: file_download
assertions.description: Tests downloading the uploaded file

assertions.name: file_deletion
assertions.description: Tests deleting the file and asserting it's removed

assertions.name: file_type_check
assertions.description: Tests uploading an invalid file type and asserting rejection

evals.prompt: Our E2E tests are slow (8 minutes for 30 tests). Help optimize: many tests log in via the UI, tests run sequentially, and there's no parallel execution. Fix the performance issues.
evals.expected_output: Optimizations: storageState auth, parallel workers, test isolation, and selective test running

assertions.name: storage_state_auth
assertions.description: Replaces UI login with storageState/API-based authentication

assertions.name: parallel_workers
assertions.description: Enables parallel test workers in playwright.config

assertions.name: test_isolation
assertions.description: Tests create their own data instead of depending on shared state

assertions.name: selective_running
assertions.description: Recommends running only affected tests on PRs

assertions.name: estimated_improvement
assertions.description: Estimates time reduction from the optimizations
